title: CobbleTypes Master
description:
The Ultimate Pokemon Type Utilities in minecraft and cobblemon!

Type Chart, Team analysis, Scanning and much more!
body:
## **No more move doubts! Dominate the battlefield with tactical analysis!** ⚡️

Tired of having to look up type weaknesses and resistances on a wiki while playing Cobblemon? Wish you had an in-game tool to quickly analyze matchups, both for a single Pokémon and your entire team? **Ultra Type Chart** is here to revolutionize your gameplay!

With the **MAJOR UPDATE v2.0.0**, the mod transforms from a simple reference manual into an **arsenal of advanced tactical tools** for Minecraft 1.21.1.

![The TypeChart icon!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23421e3e55fb08babf41283b80a1eac3ab0af1c7.png)

---

# **Main Features (v2.0.0):**

### 💎 **Survival Compatibility & Progression**

* **Total Crafting:** All advanced analysis tools are now **craftable** in Survival mode, starting with the **Multitype Stone** (obtainable with 9 Evolution Stones).

![MultiType Stone Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ea63271b624aa164788bcae90391a5584cc9004.jpeg)
  
*Photos of all crafting recipes are available further down this page.*
* **Conditional Analysis:** To add progression and realism, a Pokémon's analysis is only possible after it has been **scanned and registered in your Pokédex**.
  
* **Extended Compatibility:** Full integration with **custom types** from the **Gravel's Extended Battle** mod (optional mod). All our tools will extend analysis to these new types.

### 📒 **1. Type Chart (Base Item)**

The quick and interactive reference manual:
* **Interactive GUI:** Right-click in the air to open the general screen with all Pokémon types. Hover over any type to see a summary of its interactions.
* **Instant Profile (Chat):** Right-click on any Pokémon to immediately see its complete profile (Offensive and Defensive) in chat.

![The TypeChart Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf7e724dafe9f072c75ad0d900be1af26f05e2f1.jpeg)

### 🧮 **2. Type Calculator (Type Calculator): Flexibility**

This interactive tool offers two powerful modes for planning and learning:

* **Mode 1: Double Type Profile:** Select up to two types to instantly see all their defensive interactions (4x weaknesses, 0.25x resistances, immunities, etc.).
* **Mode 2: Attack Calculator:** Select an **Attack Type** and up to two **Defense Types** to get the exact damage multiplier that would result (e.g., an Ice Attack against a Ground/Flying target).

![The TypeCalculator crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c31b88cc39b38d31cbef86383a3ecb273902c98.jpeg)

### 🌐🥽 **3. Tactical Visor (Tactical Visor): Advanced Analysis**

This high-tech device offers the most powerful analysis features:

* **📊 Team Matchup Analysis (Right-Click on Pokémon):** Click on an opposing Pokémon (wild or another trainer's) to get an **instant ranking** of your team. The system calculates and ranks your Pokémon from best to worst for that matchup, showing:
  
* **Damage (Dmg):** The maximum potential damage your Pokémon can inflict on the target.
    
* **Takes:** The maximum potential damage your Pokémon would receive from the target.
    
* **Immunity (Immune to):** Any type your Pokémon is immune to.
    
**📈 Complete Strategic Analysis (Right-Click in Air):** Compiles a complete report highlighting your team's **overlapping weaknesses** and **offensive gaps** (types against which you have no Super Effective moves).


**🛰️ AoE Tactical Scanner (Shift + Right-Click in Air):** Executes a **30-block scan** of the field, coloring wild Pokémon based on the **Net Threat** they pose to your lead Pokémon.


**Enhanced Logic:** Threat is calculated using an advanced formula that considers: 

**Squared Type Effectiveness (Types²)**, the ratio between **Stats**, and the **Level** of both Pokémon. (20s active / 30s cooldown).

![The TacticalVisor crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b319316c9b98d39d23d6ad9f3db1ac96eeb77c0c.jpeg)

---
**🔊 Sound Feedback**
- With every use of the Type Chart, you'll hear a satisfying page-turning sound!

# **How to Use:**

1. **Obtain** the Multitype Stone via crafting and craft the tool you desire most!

2. In-game, you will find **all the necessary descriptions** to understand how the items work!

It also works with **Fakemon/Fakemons**!

*Dependencies:*
* Cobblemon (Version 1.21.1, tested with 1.6+)

### 🌍 **Complete Multi-language Support:**

The mod is fully translated and supports the following languages:

* **English**
* **Italian**
* **Japanese**
* **Simplified Chinese**
* **French**
* **Spanish**
* **German**
* **Portuguese (Brazilian)**
* **Russian**

**Feedback:** Bug reports and suggestions are welcome! You can write me on my Discord: #thecaptainfoxy

*If you want to support me, you can subscribe to my YouTube channel "TheCaptainFoxy" and donate on my PayPal!*
